We need to evaluate the given text for three questions.

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text includes a header "1. DARBA BŪTĪBA UN AKTUALITĀTE", "1.1. tabula", and a table of development plan. It doesn't list main sections like Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, etc. So it does not list main sections.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text describes the content of section 1 (the problem statement, importance). But there's only one section described. It doesn't describe other sections. So it fails.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text does not provide a general structure; it only shows one section and a table of plan. So no.

Thus all three fail. Provide JSON objects accordingly.
